codeReview.summary: The feature adds persisted result/impact/champion filters, compact-card display state, and reset wiring with focused helper tests, but it does not fully satisfy the documented route-precedence behavior for VAL-CROSS-002 because saved-lookups are not reapplied from storage after the initial mount.

issues.description: Saved lookups are loaded from localStorage only once on mount via setSavedLookups(loadSavedLookups()), so after a user loads a deep-linked player route and later triggers a saved-lookup selection, a refresh leaves the recent-account list stale in memory. Because the route auto-load effect (lines 1070-1090) no longer has access to the updated saved lookup that should coexist with persisted preferences, the implementation cannot fully prove the contract requirement that deep links continue to coexist with persisted recent-account entries after subsequent saved-lookup selection, filter changes, and refresh.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, commit 573ba22, and the touched dashboard/history-preferences files. The filter and reset behavior is implemented with adequate helper coverage, but I found a blocking gap against VAL-CROSS-002: the dashboard does not rehydrate updated saved-lookups after post-mount saved-lookup selections, so the claimed coexistence of deep links with persisted recent-account entries after saved-lookup selection and refresh is not fully satisfied.
